oraclePolicy.normative: Kanvas-owned fixtures, bundled deterministic fonts, versioned dumps, CPU oracle artifacts, route diagnostics, and GPU artifacts only when GPU support is claimed.
oraclePolicy.externalComparisons: Optional external comparisons are drift-only and cannot define pass/fail behavior.

nonClaims: This manifest is coordination and evidence infrastructure only; it does not promote complete pure Kotlin text support.
HarfBuzz, FreeType, Fontations, AWT, JNI, CoreText, DirectWrite, fontconfig, platform shapers, and native engines are not normative oracles for this manifest.
No row below claims target-supported behavior.

requiredEvidenceGates: Add A8 atlas pack fixture evidence.
Add SDF normalization fixture evidence.
Add SDF transform refusal evidence.
Add atlas capacity refusal evidence.
Add stale generation refusal evidence.
fixtureCommands: No complete-target fixture generation command exists yet; this row tracks required PKT-10 fixture evidence.

requiredEvidenceGates: Add CFF Type 2 line, curve, and flex glyph fixtures.
Add local and global subroutine fixtures.
Add malformed stack and unsupported operator refusal fixtures.
Add CFF2 blend and vsindex fixtures.
fixtureCommands: Generate or bundle deterministic CFF/CFF2 fixtures with provenance before any support claim.

requiredEvidenceGates: Add COLRv0 layer fixture evidence.
Add COLRv1 solid, gradient, transform, composite, and clip fixture evidence.
Add cycle refusal evidence.
Add color glyph budget refusal evidence.
fixtureCommands: No complete COLR/COLRv1 fixture generation command exists yet; current evidence is planning and diagnostics only.

requiredEvidenceGates: Add Arabic positive and refusal rows for joining forms, lam-alef, marks, cursive attachment, and mixed bidi.
Add Devanagari positive and refusal rows for syllable formation, reph, pre-base matra, below-base forms, and mark placement.
Add Thai positive and refusal rows for base+mark clusters, tone marks, mixed Latin/Thai runs, and paragraph-owned dictionary diagnostics.
Add CJK positive and refusal rows for Han, kana, vertical alternates, variation selectors, and paragraph-owned ruby/line-break diagnostics.
Add emoji shaping positive and refusal rows for VS15/VS16, skin tone, ZWJ sequence, fallback emoji font, and unsupported-sequence refusals.
fixtureCommands: Split complex-script fixtures by script family before any script promotion beyond Latin.

requiredEvidenceGates: Add VS15 and VS16 emoji fixture evidence.
Add skin tone fixture evidence.
Add ZWJ family sequence fixture evidence.
Add emoji fallback unavailable refusal evidence.
Add color glyph unavailable refusal evidence.
fixtureCommands: Generate deterministic emoji sequence fixtures and expected dispatch dumps before support promotion.

targetSpec.section: Font sources, SFNT/OpenType parsing, and collections

requiredEvidenceGates: Add single TTF fixture provenance.
Add TTC face-index fixture provenance.
Add malformed required table diagnostics.
Add malformed optional table diagnostics.
Add system-scan skipped file diagnostic evidence.
fixtureCommands: Current PKT-02A and PKT-03A evidence covers narrower source and face dumps only.

targetSpec.section: Font sources, SFNT/OpenType parsing, and collections

requiredEvidenceGates: Add a deterministic scan-root input fixture that lists explicit in-repo paths instead of implicit host roots.
Add skipped-file diagnostics for unreadable, malformed, unsupported, and duplicate source candidates.
Mark every system-scan source and fallback catalog dump as host-dependent when it depends on scan input.
Record fallback order dump fields for source identity, display name, content hash, and scan diagnostic codes.
Keep all discovery pure Kotlin with no hidden platform font registry or native font API.
fixtureCommands: Generate only deterministic scan-root fixtures from explicit repo paths before promoting system-scan evidence.

requiredEvidenceGates: Add DrawTextRun registered artifact fixture evidence.
Add unregistered artifact refusal evidence.
Add upload plan dump evidence.
Add route evidence proving no CPU-rendered texture route.
Add adapter-backed GPU evidence before any GPU support claim.
fixtureCommands: Current PKT-12A/PKT-12B evidence is contract-only and does not activate a GPU text route.

requiredEvidenceGates: Add Latin fixture provenance for cmap-backed glyph IDs, GSUB feature lookup order, and GPOS pair positioning data.
Add requested, enabled, disabled, and unsupported feature dump fields before enabling broader feature behavior.
Add expected glyph ID or fixture-local glyph-name dumps for liga, kern, requested-off, and unsupported-feature cases.
Add cluster range and fallback diagnostic expectations for every Latin fixture row.
Keep Greek, Cyrillic, Hebrew, and complex-script promotion out of this Latin contract slice.
fixtureCommands: Generate deterministic Latin GSUB/GPOS fixtures and reviewed dump goldens before implementing wider shaping support.

requiredEvidenceGates: Add rich style runs fixture evidence.
Add bidi paragraph fixture evidence.
Add hard and soft line break fixture evidence.
Add ellipsis, placeholders, selection boxes, and hit testing evidence.
Retain shaping and fallback gates for complete paragraph claims.
fixtureCommands: Current PKT-09A evidence covers semantic dumps and refusals only.

requiredEvidenceGates: Add bidi visual line ordering rows that name PKT-07 and PKT-08 shaping blockers separately.
Add rich style, feature, variation, decoration, and placeholder interaction rows.
Add ellipsis, hard-break, soft-wrap, and max-lines policy rows with refusal diagnostics.
Add hit-test, selection box, word boundary, and grapheme boundary golden rows.
Keep paragraph-owned layout diagnostics separate from shaping-owned fallback and script diagnostics.
fixtureCommands: Generate paragraph semantic layout goldens only after shaping-owned blockers are named per row.

requiredEvidenceGates: Add CBDT/CBLC PNG fixture evidence.
Add sbix PNG fixture evidence.
Add unavailable strike refusal evidence.
Add malformed PNG refusal evidence.
Add non-PNG payload refusal evidence.
fixtureCommands: Generate deterministic PNG bitmap glyph fixtures before support promotion.

requiredEvidenceGates: Add missing required table fixture rows with stable refusal diagnostics.
Add malformed optional table fixture rows that preserve bounded face parsing diagnostics.
Add TTC face-index positive and out-of-range refusal fixture rows.
Add cmap format 14 positive variation-selector fixture rows.
Add cmap format 14 unsupported or malformed refusal rows without claiming complete cmap coverage.
fixtureCommands: Generate or bundle deterministic malformed SFNT fixtures with expected diagnostics before parser support promotion.

requiredEvidenceGates: Add one positive fixture for every row in the required script matrix.
Add one refusal or diagnostic fixture for every row in the required script matrix.
Add shaping dumps with clusters, feature order, fallback runs, and stable diagnostics.
Keep external drift comparisons non-normative.
fixtureCommands: Generate deterministic per-script shaping fixtures with reviewed expected dumps before support promotion.

requiredEvidenceGates: Add static path SVG glyph fixture evidence.
Add gradient, transform, and clip fixture evidence.
Add use recursion refusal evidence.
Add external resource refusal evidence.
Add unsupported feature refusal evidence.
fixtureCommands: Generate deterministic SVG-in-OpenType fixtures with security refusal expectations before support promotion.

requiredEvidenceGates: Add simple glyph fixture evidence.
Add composite glyph and component transform fixture evidence.
Add gvar simple and composite delta fixture evidence.
Add avar coordinate mapping fixture evidence.
Retain diagnostics for current variation gaps until implementation evidence lands.
fixtureCommands: Current PKT-04A evidence covers narrower TrueType glyf evidence and explicit variation gaps.

requiredEvidenceGates: Add a pinned Unicode data version row before replacing BasicUnicodeData.
Document source file names and checksums for script, bidi, grapheme, and default-ignorable data inputs.
Add generated dump schema rows for sample script, bidi, grapheme, and default-ignorable facts.
Add mismatch diagnostics for generated-data version, source checksum, and generated dump schema drift.
Keep product behavior independent of the JDK Unicode version unless that dependency is explicitly diagnosed.
fixtureCommands: Add a deterministic Unicode-data generator or no-op validator before promoting beyond BasicUnicodeData.
